positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_conjecture.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    gains_knowledge(harry)).

cnf(u13,axiom,
    ~reads(X0,X1) | ~person(X0) | ~book(X1) | gains_knowledge(X0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    book(walden)).

cnf(u17,negated_conjecture,
    ~gains_knowledge(sK0)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    reads(harry,walden)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    person(harry)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define smarter(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_conjecture.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    smarter(harry)).

cnf(u13,axiom,
    reads(harry,walden)).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    ~gains_knowledge(X0) | smarter(X0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    person(harry)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    book(walden)).

cnf(u16,negated_conjecture,
    ~smarter(X0) | gains_knowledge(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    gains_knowledge(harry)).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    ~reads(X0,X1) | ~person(X0) | ~book(X1) | gains_knowledge(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
